## Файл: `clantag-afk.sp`
**Путь:** `/mnt/2TB-NVME/mge_engineer/ZH-sys/For Games/CSS/for debugging/Counter-Strike-Plugins/In Development/Metamod+SourceMod/Legacy/clantag-afk.sp`

**Описание:** Этот код представляет собой плагин для SourceMod, который отслеживает активность игроков в игре Counter-Strike: Source. Если игрок не выполняет никаких действий в течение определенного времени (установленного через консольную переменную), его тег клана устанавливается как 'AFK'. Также плагин реагирует на различные события, такие как вход игрока на сервер, выполнение команды или изменение положения.

**Includes:** sourcemod, cstrike

**Commands:** 

**ConVars:** sm_clafk_version, sm_clafk_time

**Includes:** 

**Commands:** {'command': 'TR_GetPointContents', 'description': 'Retrieves the contents mask at a specific world position, along with the entity index found there.', 'syntax': 'native TR_GetPointContents(const Float:pos[3], &entindex=-1);', 'parameters': [{'name': 'pos', 'type': 'Float[3]', 'description': 'The world coordinates to test.'}, {'name': 'entindex', 'type': 'int', 'description': '(Reference) The entity index found at the given position. Defaults to -1 if no entity is present.', 'default_value': '-1'}], 'return_type': 'int', 'example': 'int contents = TR_GetPointContents(playerPos, entindex);'}, {'command': 'TR_TraceRayFilterEx', 'description': 'Starts a trace ray using a new trace result with a custom filter function. This allows for more complex collision detection scenarios.', 'syntax': 'native Handle:TR_TraceRayFilterEx(const Float:pos[3], const Float:vec[3], flags, RayType:rtype, TraceEntityFilter:filter, any:data=0);', 'parameters': [{'name': 'pos', 'type': 'Float[3]', 'description': 'The starting position of the ray.'}, {'name': 'vec', 'type': 'Float[3]', 'description': 'Depending on RayType, it represents either the ending point or direction angle.'}, {'name': 'flags', 'type': 'int', 'description': 'Flags that modify the behavior of the trace ray.'}, {'name': 'rtype', 'type': 'RayType', 'description': 'Method to calculate the ray direction. Can be either RayType_EndPoint or RayType_DirectionAngle.'}, {'name': 'filter', 'type': 'TraceEntityFilter', 'description': 'Custom function used as a filter during tracing.'}, {'name': 'data', 'type': 'any', 'description': 'Arbitrary data value to pass through to the filter function.', 'default_value': '0'}], 'return_type': 'Handle', 'example': 'Handle:traceHandle = TR_TraceRayFilterEx(startPos, endOrDirVec, traceFlags, RayType_EndPoint, myCustomFilterFunction, additionalData);'}, {'command': 'TR_GetHitGroup', 'description': 'Retrieves the body hit group of the Handle, or INVALID_HANDLE to use a global trace result.', 'default_value': 'INVALID_HANDLE'}], 'return_type': 'int', 'example': 'int hitGroup = TR_GetHitGroup(traceHandle);'}, {'command': 'TR_PointOutsideWorld', 'description': 'Checks if a given point is outside the playable area of the world.', 'syntax': 'native TR_PointOutsideWorld(Float:pos[3]);', 'parameters': [{'name': 'pos', **Описание:** Этот плагин позволяет игрокам использовать специальный пистолет, находящийся в слоте 2 (обычно это второй активный оружие), при нажатии на кнопки 'slot1' и 'slot2'. При нажатии 'slot1', если второе оружие - MGL, игрок переключается на первое оружие. При нажатии 'slot2', если второе оружие - MGL, игрок использует это оружие.

**Commands:** slot1, slot2

**ConVars:**

(0 = default, 1 = spawn point, 2 = death location)'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_clean', 'default_value': '-1', 'description': "Set the time in seconds after which dead players' bodies disappear. (-1 = never disappear)"}, {'name': 'sm_revival_dissolve_effect', 'default_value': '0', 'description': 'Set the dissolve effect for disappearing bodies. (0 = none, 1 = fire, 2 = water, etc.)'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_team_check', 'default_value': '1', 'description': 'Allow reviving only players from the same team.'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_round_end', 'default_value': '1', 'description': 'Allow reviving even after the round has ended.'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_enemy_revive', 'default_value': '0', 'description': 'Allow reviving players from the enemy team.'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_progress_bar', 'default_value': '1', 'description': 'Show a progress bar when reviving others.'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_percent_display', 'default_value': '1', 'description': 'Display the percentage of completion for the revival process.'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_effect', 'default_value': '1', 'description': 'Enable visual effects when reviving others.'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_radius', 'default_value': '200.0', 'description': 'Set the radius within which players can revive others.'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_time_limit', 'default_value': '30', 'description': 'Set the time limit in seconds for reviving others.'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_feed', 'default_value': '7', 'description': 'Show revives in the killfeed to allies (1), enemies (2), and spectators (4).'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_last_man_standing', 'default_value': '0', 'description': 'Disable reviving when only one player is alive on one of the teams.'}, {'name': 'sm_revival_duel_mode', 'default_value': '0', 'description': 'Disable reviving when both teams have one player alive.'}

**ConVars:** {'name': 'sm_stk_enabled', 'default': '1', 'description': 'Enables(1) or disables(0) the plugin.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_reflect', 'default': '1', 'description': 'Enables(1) or disables(0) reflecting damage back onto a team attacker.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_limit', 'default': '5', 'description': 'Sets the number of TKs a player has to get before they are automatically kicked.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_forgivemessage', 'default': '1', 'description': 'Changes who the forgiven and not forgiven messages can be seen by. 0 - Nobody, 1 - Everyone, 2 - People involved, 3 - Admin and people involved, 4 - Admins only'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_countmessage', 'default': '2', 'description': 'Changes who the TK count message can be seen by. 0 - Nobody, 1 - Everyone, 2 - Person, 3 - Admin and person, 4 - Admins only'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_punishmessage', 'default': '1', 'description': 'Changes who the punishment messages can be seen by. 0 - Nobody, 1 - Everyone, 2 - People involved, 3 - Admin and people involved, 4 - Admins only'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_kickmessage', 'default': '1', 'description': 'Show a message to everyone(1) or admin only (2) when a player is kicked for TKing. 0 to disable'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_protecttime', 'default': '10', 'description': 'Automatically slay any team attacker in spawn during this amount of seconds after spawn'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_immunity', 'default': '7', 'description': 'Manages admin immunity mode. See documentation for full value list.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_punishmode', 'default': '1', 'description': 'Manages the TKer punishment modes. 0 - No additional punishment. 1 - Let the victim choose. 2 - Use sm_stk_punishment'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_punishment', 'default': '1', 'description': 'Manages the TKer punishment if sm_stk_punishmode = 2. 0 - Warn, 1 - Slay, 2 - Burn, 3 - Freeze, 4 - Beacon, 5 - Freeze Bomb, 6 - Fire Bomb, 7 - Time Bomb, 8 - Drug, 9 - Remove % Cash, 10 - Slap'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_allowslay', 'default': '1', 'description': 'If sm_stk_punishmode = 1, allow slaying the attacker as a punishment.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_allowfreeze', 'default': '1', 'description': 'If sm_stk_punishmode = 1, allow freezing the attacker as a punishment.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_allowbeacon', 'default': '1', 'description': 'If sm_stk_punishmode = 1, allow putting a beacon on the attacker as a punishment.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_allowfreezebomb', 'default': '1', 'description': 'If sm_stk_punishmode = 1, allow putting a freezebomb on the attacker as a punishment.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_allowfirebomb', 'default': '1', 'description': 'If sm_stk_punishmode = 1, allow putting a firebomb on the attacker as a punishment.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_allowtimebomb', 'default': '1', 'description': 'If sm_stk_punishmode = 1, allow putting a timebomb on the attacker as a punishment.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_drugtime', 'default': '10', 'description': 'If sm_stk_punishmode = 1, set the time a TKer is drugged as a punishment. 0.0 to disable.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_burntime', 'default': '10', 'description': 'If sm_stk_punishmode = 1, set the time a TKer is burnt as a punishment. 0.0 to disable.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_slapdamage', 'default': '5', 'description': 'If sm_stk_punishmode = 1, slap the TKer for this amount of damage as a punishment. 0 to disable.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_bantime', 'default': '-1', 'description': 'Manages how long a player is banned for once they reach the TK limit. (Less than 0 is a kick)'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_removecash', 'default': '25', 'description': 'Sets the percentage of cash the victim can remove from the attacker. 0 to disable. Only for CSS.'}, {'name': 'sm_stk_logging', 'default': '2', 'description': 'Sets the logging mode. 0 = No logging, 1 = Verbose logging, 2 = Only log TK Count and "Kicked" messages, 3 = Only log "Kicked" messages'}

**Описание:** Этот плагин для SourceMod отслеживает количество ударов, нанесенных игроком с помощью определенного типа ножа, и меняет внешний вид ножа в зависимости от количества ударов. При каждом уроне ножа проверяется его класс, и если он соответствует заданному, увеличивается счетчик урона. Если счетчик достигает определенных порогов, внешний вид ножа изменяется.

**ConVars:**
